name: brewwery
description: A clean macOS desktop app to manage Homebrew packages, casks, services, updates, cleanup, diagnostics, and Brewfiles.
author: Made Büro

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @brewwery/shared-types build && pnpm --filter @brewwery/brewwery-core build && pnpm --filter @brewwery/desktop build
scripts.package:mac:dir: pnpm --filter @brewwery/shared-types build && pnpm --filter @brewwery/brewwery-core build:darwin:arm64 && pnpm --filter @brewwery/desktop package:mac:dir
scripts.package:mac: pnpm --filter @brewwery/shared-types build && pnpm --filter @brewwery/brewwery-core build:darwin:arm64 && pnpm --filter @brewwery/desktop package:mac
scripts.package:mac:zip: pnpm --filter @brewwery/shared-types build && pnpm --filter @brewwery/brewwery-core build:darwin:arm64 && pnpm --filter @brewwery/desktop package:mac:zip
scripts.package:mac:x64: pnpm --filter @brewwery/shared-types build && pnpm --filter @brewwery/brewwery-core build:darwin:x64 && pnpm --filter @brewwery/desktop package:mac:x64
scripts.package:mac:universal: pnpm --filter @brewwery/shared-types build && pnpm --filter @brewwery/brewwery-core build:darwin:universal && pnpm --filter @brewwery/desktop package:mac:universal
scripts.release:verify: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && cargo test --manifest-path crates/brewwery-core/Cargo.toml && pnpm --filter @brewwery/desktop build && pnpm package:mac:dir
